title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 teaches database deployment and management at scale using SQL and NoSQL. It covers best practices for efficient data storage and querying. The lecture is part of Harvard's CS50 curriculum offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
